title: CreativeInventory+
description: A collection of creative tweaks to make the creative building experience slightly better
body:
# Creative Inventory Plus

A simple client-side mod that enhances the creative building experience.

## ⚠️ This mod is currently in alpha — features and behavior may change.

## Features

- Saved Hotbar Preview:
    Hold your configured key (default: Left Alt) to preview your 9 saved creative hotbars and quickly switch between them using the scroll wheel.

## Notes

- Fully client-side: works fine on servers
- Designed for Minecraft 1.21+.
- Forge version is planned for later
